title: teucrium turdetanum
intro: Teucrium turdetanum, also known as Spanish valerian, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family, native to the Iberian Peninsula. The medicinal properties of Teucrium turdetanum have been traditionally used to treat anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness due to its sedative and anxiolytic properties. The health benefits of this herb include its ability to promote relaxation, reduce stress levels, and improve sleep quality. Herbal preparations of Teucrium turdetanum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support the nervous system and promote overall well-being.
